steps.title: Distribute the subtraction
steps.content:
Subtracting the second polynomial changes every sign in it. This is the key step because the last constant becomes positive and cancels the first constant later in the simplification.
$$
(7t^4-8t^2+5t-3)-(6t^4-4t^3+9t^2-3)
$$
$$
=7t^4-8t^2+5t-3-6t^4+4t^3-9t^2+3
$$

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content: Group terms with the same power of $t$. $$ (7t^4-6t^4)+4t^3+(-8t^2-9t^2)+5t+(-3+3) $$ $$ =t^4+4t^3-17t^2+5t $$ The answer is A.
